rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(13, 12, 34), rgb(237, 237, 237)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(13, 12, 34), rgb(237, 237, 237));

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(13, 12, 34), rgb(237, 237, 237)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 26px; height: 1px; padding-top: 43px; margin-left: 84px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 35px; font-family: "Comic Sans MS"; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
